_comment: Triaged dependency advisories for the OB-086 CI audit gate. Keys are GitHub advisory (GHSA) source ids as reported by `npm audit --json`. Adding an id here suppresses that HIGH/CRITICAL advisory in CI; new (un-listed) high/critical advisories fail the build. Optional `expires` (YYYY-MM-DD) forces a re-triage once passed. See docs/SECURITY-SCANNING.md.

1109842.name: glob
1109842.reason: glob CLI command injection (GHSA-5j98-mcp5-4vw2). Transitive build/dev tooling dependency; the glob CLI is never invoked with untrusted input in this repo. Cleared on next tooling bump.

1115554.name: picomatch
1115554.reason: picomatch ReDoS (GHSA-3v7f-55p6-f55p). Transitive build/test tooling dependency, not exposed to attacker-controlled glob patterns at runtime. Cleared on next tooling bump.

1120654.name: tmp
1120654.reason: tmp path traversal via prefix/postfix (GHSA-ph9p-34f9-6g65). Pulled in transitively by @nestjs/cli (dev/build only); not present in the production runtime image. Fix requires a breaking @nestjs/cli major.

1113635.name: multer
1113635.reason: multer DoS via incomplete cleanup (GHSA-xf7r-hgr6-v32p). Tracked for a @nestjs/platform-express upgrade; the API does not currently expose untrusted multipart upload endpoints. Accepted risk pending upstream bump.

1113636.name: multer
1113636.reason: multer DoS via resource exhaustion (GHSA-v52c-386h-88mc). Tracked with the @nestjs/platform-express upgrade; no untrusted multipart upload endpoints exposed. Accepted risk pending upstream bump.

1113996.name: multer
1113996.reason: multer DoS via uncontrolled recursion (GHSA-5528-5vmv-3xc2). Tracked with the @nestjs/platform-express upgrade; no untrusted multipart upload endpoints exposed. Accepted risk pending upstream bump.

1121089.name: multer
1121089.reason: multer DoS via deeply nested field names (GHSA-72gw-mp4g-v24j). Tracked with the @nestjs/platform-express upgrade; no untrusted multipart upload endpoints exposed. Accepted risk pending upstream bump.

1112653.name: next
1112653.reason: Next.js RSC request-deserialization DoS (GHSA-9g9p-9gw9-jx7f). Tracked for a Next.js upgrade in the web app; accepted risk pending the framework bump.

1116376.name: next
1116376.reason: Next.js DoS with Server Components (GHSA-h25m-26qc-wcjf). Tracked for a Next.js upgrade in the web app; accepted risk pending the framework bump.

1117931.name: next
1117931.reason: Next.js DoS with Server Components (GHSA-ggv3-7p47-pfv8). Tracked for a Next.js upgrade in the web app; accepted risk pending the framework bump.

1118954.name: next
1118954.reason: Next.js SSRF via WebSocket upgrades (GHSA-q4gf-8mx6-v5v3). Tracked for a Next.js upgrade in the web app; accepted risk pending the framework bump.

1118962.name: next
1118962.reason: Next.js middleware/proxy bypass in Pages Router i18n apps (GHSA-8h8q-6873-q5fj). Tracked for a Next.js upgrade in the web app; accepted risk pending the framework bump.
